title: Neobartlettia paezensis
taxonomy: Neobartlettia paezensis is classified as a species within the genus Neobartlettia, which is a group of flowering plants in the family Asteraceae. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other species. The family Asteraceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The genus Neobartlettia is a relatively small and recently discovered group of plants. Neobartlettia paezensis is a unique and interesting species within this genus.
